level_signals: Track record of launching ambitious products
Comp range $285K-$305K base, consistent with Senior IC at Anthropic

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have a combined 5+ years in product management and engineering
including at least 1 year as a professional engineer
Have a deep technical background with experience working cross-functionally with engineering teams to ship technical products
Track record of launching ambitious products that have achieved distribution or commercial success
Stay up-to-date and hands-on with AI coding tools, model capabilities, and industry trends
Bachelor's degree or an equivalent combination of education, training, and/or experience

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in dev tools is preferred
Have a creative, hacker spirit and love solving puzzles

scope.surface: Claude Code product suite (CLI + agentic coding tools for developers)
scope.business_model: developer-facing product, mixed B2C and B2B
primary_metrics_inferred: Best-in-class status vs competing AI coding tools
core_responsibilities: Define the roadmap for an area of the Claude Code product suite
Translate cutting-edge AI advances into practical developer features
Build an ecosystem around the CLI and other products so developers can share best practices
Work with internal users and customers to prioritize requirements and ship improvements

compensation.equity_form: optional equity donation matching mentioned (suggests options/RSUs are part of package)

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($285K-$305K base)
Clear product surface and ownership area (not vague)
Recently posted (within last ~5 weeks at time of fetch)
Encourages applications even from candidates who don't meet every qualification
Anthropic's mission and engineering culture are strong signals for a senior PM
red_flags: Hybrid policy requires at least 25% office time; SF or Seattle only — eliminates fully-remote candidates
JD metadata field says 'On-Site' but body says hybrid 25% — mild inconsistency, worth confirming with recruiter
Hard requirement of '1+ year as a professional engineer' is specific and difficult to mitigate without that experience

fields_inferred_not_stated: scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not in JD)
ambiguities: JD position is listed as 'On-Site' in metadata but the body describes 25% in-office hybrid policy. Treated as hybrid here.
